title: Gentle Hangover Russian Celery Broth
description: A fresh and springy hangover cure featuring celery, a low-glycemic-friendly Russian dish made with a poached broth and served in a clay pot. Perfect for a morning pick-me-up.
instructions: Cut the celery and carrots into bite-sized pieces.
Peel and chop the onion and mince the garlic.
In a large clay pot, combine the chicken broth, celery, carrots, onion, and garlic.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the lemon juice and dill to the pot and continue to simmer for another 10 minutes.
Mash the potatoes in a separate bowl and stir them into the pot.
Season the broth with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the hangover broth hot in small clay bowls.
Garnish with additional dill and lemon wedges if desired.
